scripts.dev: npm run db:check && npm run db:migrate:deploy && next dev
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.ci:quality: npm run build && npm run test && npm run perf:check && npm run wcag:check
scripts.db:up: echo Using Neon managed Postgres; no local database container to start.
scripts.db:down: echo Using Neon managed Postgres; no local database container to stop.
scripts.db:generate: npm run db:check && dotenv -e .env.local -- prisma generate
scripts.db:migrate: npm run db:check && dotenv -e .env.local -- prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: npm run db:check && dotenv -e .env.local -- prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: npm run db:check && dotenv -e .env.local -- prisma db seed
scripts.db:studio: npm run db:check && dotenv -e .env.local -- prisma studio
